function solve(nums: number[]): number {
    const absSorted = nums.map(x => Math.abs(x)).sort((a, b) => a - b);
    let count = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < absSorted.length; i++) {
        const target = 2 * absSorted[i];
        let low = i + 1;
        let high = absSorted.length - 1;
        let res = i;
        while (low <= high) {
            const mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);
            if (absSorted[mid] <= target) {
                res = mid;
                low = mid + 1;
            } else {
                high = mid - 1;
            }
        }
        if (res > i) {
            count += res - i;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

function solve(nums: number[]): number {

    const absSorted = nums.map(x => Math.abs(x)).sort((a, b) => a - b);

    let count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < absSorted.length; i++) {

        const target = 2 * absSorted[i];

        let low = i + 1;

        let high = absSorted.length - 1;

        let res = i; // initially, no elements found

        while (low <= high) {

            const mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);

            if (absSorted[mid] <= target) {

                res = mid;

                low = mid + 1;

            } else {

                high = mid - 1;

            }

        }

        if (res > i) {

            count += res - i;

        }

    }

    return count;

}
